5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (src/main.ts). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/simatec/ioBroker.dnscope/blob/master/io-package.json).

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json5/items/noipUser" attribute "placeholder" uses key "example@gmail.com" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#80] "[iobroker-bot] Add Dependabot Ignore Rule for @types/node Major Version Updates"](https://github.com/simatec/ioBroker.dnscope/issues/80)

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script 5.2.0 specified. 5.2.1 is required as minimum,  5.2.1 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/simatec/ioBroker.dnscope/blob/master/package.json)

0088.issue: [S0088] "/tsconfig.json" should contain an extends clause like "extends": "@tsconfig/node20/tsconfig.json" (see ioBroker.examples).

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. The current engines.node clause ">= 20" allows Node.js 20.0.0 as minimum. Please update it to require at least ">=22" at [package.json](https://github.com/simatec/ioBroker.dnscope/blob/master/package.json).

0034.issue: [W0034] @iobroker/adapter-core 3.3.2 specified. 3.4.1 (or newer) is current. Please update dependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/simatec/ioBroker.dnscope/blob/master/package.json)

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.1" at [package.json](https://github.com/simatec/ioBroker.dnscope/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.

0086.issue: [W0086] "@tsconfig/node22" should match the major node.js version from [package.json](https://github.com/simatec/ioBroker.dnscope/blob/master/package.json) engines.node (>=20). Please update to @tsconfig/node20 at [package.json](https://github.com/simatec/ioBroker.dnscope/blob/master/package.json).
